name: Ancient Nav Core
description: A navigation computer from a lost civilization. Increases ship speed.

name: Plasma Lens
description: A focusing crystal that amplifies weapon energy. Increases damage.

name: Mining Drone Module
description: An automated mining assistant. Increases mining speed.

name: Void Compass
description: Points toward valuable resources. Increases ship speed slightly.

name: Xeno Battery
description: An alien power cell of unknown origin. Boosts damage output.

name: Echo Scanner
description: Resonance-based mineral detector. Greatly improves mining efficiency.
